name: Two-population (Goldie-Coldman) resistance model — CRC first line
description: Mechanistic resistance for CRC first line: a drug-sensitive clone S and a pre-existing drug-resistant clone R, observed as V = S + R (dS/dt = (kg - kd*E)*S, dR/dt = kgr*R). The drug kills only the sensitive clone; post-nadir regrowth is the resistant subpopulation outgrowing. kd is matched to the CRC Claret model so the contrast isolates the resistance MECHANISM. Values illustrative (CRC first-line scale) and unverified; R0 (initial resistant burden) is interpretable but practically unidentifiable from a short trial.

known_failure_modes.condition: applied to a regimen whose regrowth is not driven by a resistant subclone
known_failure_modes.behavior: R0 / kgr unidentifiable; the resistant tail is fabricated rather than fit
